audit_items.proof_trace: Every early-return path after `list = strdup(settings.inter)` at L3639 calls `free(list)` before returning: L3659-3660 (notls), L3667-3668 (btls), L3675-3676 (mtls), L3691-3692 (proto/no-']'), L3712-3713 (proxy not enabled), L3717-3718 (not built with proxy), L3736-3737 (invalid tag), L3748-3749 (tag length), L3765-3766 (invalid IPv6), L3784-3785 (invalid port). The normal-exit path at L3799 also calls `free(list)`. The strdup-NULL-check path at L3643 correctly returns without freeing since no allocation succeeded.
